name: Simple Salad
recipeIngredient: 1/2 tsp Oregano (I used dry, but fresh would be better)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the diced zucchini, yellow squash, green onions, Roma tomatoes, and sun-dried tomatoes together.
2. Add 3 tablespoons of cider vinegar, 1/2 teaspoon of oregano, salt, and pepper to taste.
3. Stir everything until well combined.
4. This salad can be eaten plain or served over pasta or rice for added flavor.
